question: 京东下一个想做什么板块？
must_cover: Food delivery and instant retail are identified as primary long-term strategic directions
The 'new business' segment showed explosive revenue growth in 2025 (~157% YoY)
International business expansion is part of the strategy
Differentiated models such as Seven Fresh Kitchen catering
must_not_claim: A precise standalone profit/loss figure for JD Food Delivery alone
Granular per-venture capital allocation that the sources do not break out
notes: Derived from docs/京东的报告.md. Sources aggregate new-business revenue; per-venture breakdown is intentionally a hallucination trap.
